stemHtml:
Given the following information from an Air Almanac, what is the daylight saving time and date in country B if the time and date in country A is 01:50 standard Time (ST) 20th June?

ST in country A is UTC +13 hours
ST in country B is UTC -11 hours.

Daylight saving times (ST +1 hour) is kept in country B from March to October.
